scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/core && npm run build -w packages/mcp-server && npm run build -w packages/sdk && npm run build -w packages/cli
scripts.test: npm test -w packages/core && npm test -w packages/mcp-server && npm test -w packages/sdk && npm test -w packages/cli
scripts.lint: tsc --noEmit -p packages/core && tsc --noEmit -p packages/mcp-server && tsc --noEmit -p packages/sdk && tsc --noEmit -p packages/cli
